title: text search with @Search annotations
description: Full-text search with @Search annotations. Key topics: @Search.searchable enables full-text search on a CDS view. Fields annotated with @Search.defaultSearchElement are included. @Search.fuzzinessThreshold controls fuzzy matching (0.0 - 1.0).

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆@Search.searchable enables full-text search on a CDS view
◆Fields annotated with @Search.defaultSearchElement are included
◆@Search.fuzzinessThreshold controls fuzzy matching (0.0 - 1.0)
◆@Search.ranking defines search result ranking (TITLE / SUMMARY / LOW)
◆Search is case-insensitive by default
◆The Fiori search bar uses these annotations automatically

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆@Search.searchable enables full-text search on a CDS view
◆Fields annotated with @Search.defaultSearchElement are included
◆@Search.fuzzinessThreshold controls fuzzy matching (0.0 - 1.0)
◆@Search.ranking defines search result ranking (TITLE / SUMMARY / LOW)
◆Search is case-insensitive by default
◆The Fiori search bar uses these annotations automatically

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_SEARCH'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Full-text search with @Search.searchable'
@Search.searchable: true
define view ZPRAC_CDS_SEARCH
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      /*
       * AgencyID is included in search but has lower ranking
       */
      @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
      @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.7
      @Search.ranking: #SUMMARY
      agency_id         as AgencyId,

      /*
       * CustomerID is searchable with medium relevance
       */
      @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
      @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
      @Search.ranking: #SUMMARY
      customer_id       as CustomerId,

      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,

      /*
       * Description is a TITLE-ranking field — shows prominently
       * in search results with fuzzy matching
       */
      @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
      @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.9
      @Search.ranking: #TITLE
      description       as Description,

      status            as Status
}
details:
in the global search

SEARCH ANNOTATION REFERENCE:

┌──────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┐

│ Annotation │ Description │

├──────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────┤

│ @Search.searchable │ Enable search for the view │

│ @Search.defaultSearchElement │ Include in global search │

│ @Search.fuzzinessThreshold │ 0.0 (exact) to 1.0 (very fuzzy)│

│ @Search.ranking: #TITLE │ Highest relevance │

│ @Search.ranking: #SUMMARY │ Medium relevance │

│ @Search.ranking: #LOW │ Low relevance │

└──────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┘

ENTERPRISE SEARCH MODELS (ESH):

A separate CDS artifact (`define search model`) that connects CDS

views to SAP Enterprise Search (ESH) for federated full-text search

across multiple business objects.

Unlike @Search.searchable (Fiori search bar), Enterprise Search:

- Uses a dedicated `define search model` artifact

- Can search across multiple CDS views simultaneously

- Requires ESH infrastructure and indexing

- Supports federated search (BW, ERP, CRM data together)

Example (conceptual — requires ESH setup):

@Search.searchable: true

define search model ZPRAC_ESH_TRAVEL

on ZPRAC_CDS_SEARCH

{

key TravelId;

field Description with relevance: #HIGH;

field AgencyId with relevance: #MEDIUM;

}

NOTE: Enterprise Search is being modernized by SAP's Federated

Search strategy. Prefer @Search.searchable for Fiori apps and

@Analytics.query for analytical search.
